_comment: Strings that must appear verbatim. The copy agent cannot paraphrase these.

locks.copy: We never pressure you after a storm. We give you the facts and let you decide.
locks.reason: Storm chasers are the #1 distrust signal for roofing homeowners. This line directly addresses the fear.

locks.copy: Insurance help is included at no extra charge.
locks.reason: Homeowners assume insurance navigation costs extra. Naming the inclusion removes friction.

locks.copy: Every estimate is written and itemized. No surprises on invoice.
locks.reason: Surprise charges are the most common 1-star review trigger in roofing.

locks.copy: We run a magnet over the yard and haul every shingle. We leave it cleaner than we found it.
locks.reason: Nails in the yard/pool are a recurring homeowner nightmare. Specificity here converts.
